name: NOVAGOLD RESOURCES INC.
description: NOVAGOLD RESOURCES INC. is a precious metals company focused on the development of its 50%-owned Donlin Gold project in Alaska, one of the world's largest, highest-grade, and most prospective known open-pit gold deposits. Partnered with Barrick Gold Corporation, NOVAGOLD is dedicated to advancing the project through the permitting and technical study phases. The company maintains a strong financial position and is committed to responsible mining practices, environmental stewardship, and maintaining positive relationships with Alaska Native stakeholders while creating long-term value for its shareholders.
